channel.title: +Kentum-like on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Kentum-like on Vishvas's notes

item.title: North Europe
item.description: Mediterranian considered separately. Residual awareness Residual awareness of obliteration of the better pagan heritage. The Vénus of Quinipily is a statue of a goddess that has been worshipped in Brittany for about 2000 years. YT
